entity.summary: European centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and operated within the W Group ecosystem, offering spot, margin, futures, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: Official company material identifies a 2018 founding and continuing operation within the W Group ecosystem. HEI retains Ukraine as the existing historical origin classification.

expected.summary: Ukraine-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the WhiteBIT brand.

changes.summary: European centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and operated within the W Group ecosystem, offering spot, margin, futures, and related digital-asset services.
changes.notes: Official company material identifies a 2018 founding and continuing operation within the W Group ecosystem. HEI retains Ukraine as the existing historical origin classification.

events.title: WhiteBIT was founded
events.description: WhiteBIT was founded in 2018 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

events.title: WhiteBIT announced its United States market expansion
events.description: WhiteBIT announced the launch of a locally operated United States platform with a New York headquarters, extending the wider exchange brand into the U.S. market.
events.notes: This is recorded as a major regional expansion of the wider WhiteBIT exchange ecosystem, not as a terminal change to the original exchange entity.

evidence.title: About WhiteBIT
evidence.notes: Official company page states that WhiteBIT was founded in 2018.

evidence.title: What is a crypto exchange? How does cryptocurrency exchange work
evidence.notes: Official WhiteBIT article corroborates that the exchange was founded in 2018.

evidence.title: WhiteBIT official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current WhiteBIT identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for WhiteBIT
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the WhiteBIT identity and continuing market activity.

evidence.title: WhiteBIT Expands Globally with U.S. Launch and Times Square Campaign
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the December 1, 2025 United States launch and New York headquarters.

evidence.title: WhiteBIT launches U.S. exchange with New York HQ and Times Square debut
evidence.notes: Independent coverage corroborates the launch date, New York headquarters, and U.S. market entry.
